member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.AuthenticationOptions
member.summary: Configuration for MSAL-based OneDrive authentication.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.AuthenticationOptions.ConsumersTenant
member.summary: The Azure AD authority tenant for personal Microsoft accounts.
member.remarks: Only the consumers tenant is supported (AU-01). Work and school accounts are explicitly excluded.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.AuthenticationOptions.ClientId
member.summary: The MSAL application (client) ID from the Azure app registration.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.AuthenticationOptions.TokenCacheDirectory
member.summary: Directory in which the token cache file is stored (AU-02). Defaults to %LOCALAPPDATA%/AStar.Dev.OneDriveSync.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.AuthenticationOptions.TokenCacheFileName
member.summary: Filename for the MSAL token cache (AU-02).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.FileConsentStore
member.summary: JSON file-backed implementation of . Consent decisions are written to consent.json inside the supplied directory and persist across application restarts (AU-03).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.FileConsentStore.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of , loading any previously persisted consent decisions from .
member.param: Directory in which consent.json is stored.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IConsentPrompt
member.summary: Abstraction for the dialog presented to the user before falling back to the insecure local token-cache store when the OS keychain is unavailable (AU-03).
member.remarks: Decoupling the prompt from the cache initialiser allows the UI layer to supply a platform-appropriate dialog (Avalonia message box, console prompt, etc.) while keeping the authentication logic independently testable.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IConsentPrompt.RequestConsentAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Displays a consent dialog to the user explaining that the OS keychain is unavailable and requesting permission to use an encrypted local fallback store instead.
member.param: The explanation to show the user.
member.returns: true if the user grants consent; false if the user declines.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IConsentStore
member.summary: Persists per-account user-consent decisions for the insecure local token-cache fallback (AU-03).
member.remarks: A consent decision is stored against the account's unique identifier so that multiple Microsoft accounts on the same machine each have an independent opt-in record.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IConsentStore.HasConsented(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true when the user associated with has previously granted consent to use the insecure local cache fallback.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IConsentStore.RecordConsent(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Records the user's consent decision for .
member.param: true if the user granted consent; false if denied.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IMsalClient
member.summary: Abstracts MSAL public-client operations to decouple application logic from the MSAL builder API and enable unit testing.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IMsalClient.GetAccountsAsync
member.summary: Returns all accounts currently held in the MSAL token cache.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IMsalClient.AcquireTokenSilentAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},Microsoft.Identity.Client.IAccount,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempts to acquire an access token silently from the cache (AU-04).
member.param: The account hint; pass null to use any cached account.
member.exception: Thrown when the cache does not contain a valid token and user interaction is required.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IMsalClient.AcquireTokenInteractiveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Acquires an access token via interactive browser sign-in (AU-04).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IMsalClient.RemoveAccountAsync(Microsoft.Identity.Client.IAccount)
member.summary: Removes the specified account from the MSAL token cache.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.ITokenManager
member.summary: Manages access-token acquisition for OneDrive API calls. Tokens are refreshed silently whenever possible; user interaction is requested only when the silent path fails (AU-04).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.ITokenManager.AcquireAccessTokenAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a valid access token for the requested . Attempts silent acquisition first; falls back to interactive sign-in only when the cached token is absent or expired (AU-04).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.ITokenManager.SignOutAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Signs out all cached accounts, clearing the local token cache.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.MsalClient
member.summary: Default implementation that delegates to an configured for personal Microsoft accounts (consumers tenant, AU-01).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.MsalClient.#ctor(Microsoft.Identity.Client.IPublicClientApplication)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of wrapping the supplied .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.TokenCacheInitializer
member.summary: Registers the MSAL token cache on an . On platforms where the OS keychain is available the cache is secured by the keychain. When the keychain is unavailable (common on headless Linux), explicit user consent is required before falling back to a machine-scoped encrypted local file — tokens are never stored as plain text (AU-02, AU-03).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.TokenCacheInitializer.#ctor(AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IConsentStore,AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IConsentPrompt)
member.summary: Production constructor: uses to register the OS-keychain-backed cache.
Overload that accepts an injectable keychain-registration delegate, enabling the keychain path to be replaced in unit tests.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.TokenCacheInitializer.InitializeAsync(Microsoft.Identity.Client.IPublicClientApplication,AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.AuthenticationOptions,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers the token cache on . Tries the OS keychain first; on failure, gates the insecure fallback behind explicit per-account user consent (AU-03).
member.param: The MSAL public client application to configure.
Authentication options supplying cache path settings.
The unique identifier of the account whose consent record is consulted.
member.exception: Thrown when the OS keychain is unavailable and the user declines consent for the insecure fallback store.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.TokenManager
member.summary: MSAL-backed implementation of . Acquires tokens silently from the local cache (AU-02, AU-04) and only initiates an interactive browser flow when the cache cannot satisfy the request (AU-04).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.TokenManager.#ctor(AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Authentication.IMsalClient)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of .
member.param: The MSAL client used to acquire tokens.
